        2251

        2300
        2301

        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
        <title>Zahra Zaranwala portfolio</title>
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Boldonse&family=Poppins:ital,wght@0,100;0,200;0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;0,800;0,900;1,100;1,200;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,600;1,700;1,800;1,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <style>
        * {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        }
        body{
        background-color: rgb(77, 0, 128);
        color: white;
        font-family: "Poppins", sans-serif;
        }
        nav{
        background-color: rgba(93,0,255,0.277);
        height:80px;
        padding:30px;
        }
        .hamburger{
        font-size:30px;
        cursor:pointer;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        text-align: right;
        color: rgba(222, 0, 0, 0.723);
        }
        .mobile-menu{
        position:fixed;
        top:0;
        right:-100%;
        width:250px;
        height:100vh;
        background: #00ffe5;
        transition:0.4s ease;
        padding-top:60px;
        }
        .mobile-menu.active{
        right:0;
        }
        .close-btn{
        position:absolute;
        top:20px;
        right:20px;
        font-size:25px;
        cursor:pointer;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        section{
        scroll-margin-top:100px;
        }
        div.logo{
        color:rgb(255, 0, 0);
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 40px;
        }
        main hr{
        border:0;
        background: #ff0000
        height1.2px;
        margin: 60px 84px;
        }
        .left{
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        }
        .firstsection{
        display: flex;
        justify-content:space-around;
        align-items: center;
        margin:130px 0;
        }
        .firstsection > div{
        width: 80%;
        }
        .leftsection{
        font-size:3rem;
        }
        .leftsection .btn{
        padding: 50px 0;
        }
        .leftsection .btn{
        padding: 12px;
        background-color: rgb(255, 0, 0);
        color:black;
        border: 2px solid white;
        border-radius: 6px;
        font-size: 20px;
        cursor: pointer;
        }
        /* Left Text */
        .leftsection{
        max-width:600px;
        }
        .leftsection h1{
        font-size:42px;
        color:white;
        }
        .rightsection img{
        width: 70%;
        height: 40px 40px;
        padding:30px 50px;
        text-align:right;
        background-attachment:fixed;
        background-color: rgb(128, 128, 128);
        }
        .purple{
        color: rgb(0, 85, 255);
        }
        #element{
        color: rgb(0, 85, 255);
        }
        .typed-text{
        font-size:24px;
        margin:20px 0;
        color:white;
        }
        /* STATS SECTION */
        .stats-container{
        display:flex;
        justify-content: left;
        gap:40px;
        flex-wrap:wrap;
        }
        .stat-box{
        background-color:rgba(0, 128, 0, 0.408);
        border:2px solid hashtag#ff00f2;
        padding:40px 60px;
        border-radius:20px;
        text-align:center;
        box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.4);
        transition:0.3s;
        }
        .stat-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-8px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        .stat-number{
        font-size:48px;
        font-weight:800;
        color:hashtag#0008ff;
        }
        .stat-text{
        font-size:18px;
        margin-top:10px;
        letter-spacing:1px;
        }
        /* SPLIT LAYOUT */
        .split-section{
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        justify-content:space-between;
        gap:40px;
        margin-bottom:60px;
        flex-wrap:wrap;
        }
        .split-image{
        flex:1;
        text-align:center;
        }
        .split-image img{
        width:100%;
        max-width:400px;
        border-radius:15px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.6);
        }
        .split-text{
        flex:1;
        }
        .split-text h3{
        font-size:26px;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:15px;
        }
        .split-text p{
        font-size:16px;
        line-height:1.7;
        }
        #about{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f; /* Dark section background */
        display:flex;
        justify-content:center; /* Center horizontally */
        }
        /* Black Box */
        .about-box{
        width:60%;
        max-width:900px;
        padding:50px;
        background:#000; /* Pure black box */
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        text-align:center;
        color:white;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        /* Hover Effect */
        .about-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:rgba(0, 208, 255, 0.916);
        }
        /* Title */
        .about-title{
        font-size:50px;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:25px;
        letter-spacing:2px;
        color: #2196F3;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Paragraph */
        .about-box p{
        font-size:18px;
        line-height:1.8;
        text-align:center;
        color: #f3216b;
        }
        #certified-course-workshop{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Title */
        #certified-course-workshop-title{
        font-size:50px;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:50px;
        letter-spacing:2px;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Container centers all boxes */
        .certificate-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center; /* This centers each box */
        gap:40px;
        }
        /* Certificate Box */
        .certificate-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        background: blue;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        margin:0 auto; /* extra center safety */
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .certificate-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#ff0062;
        }
        /* Image Left */
        .certificate img{
        width:250px;
        height:auto;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        /* Right Content */
        .certificate-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:rgb(162, 16, 16);
        }
        .certificate-details h3{
        color:hashtaghsl(174, 100%, 50%);
        font-size:22px;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .certificate-details p{
        font-size:17px;
        line-height:1.6;
        }
        #education{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f;
        display:flex;
        justify-content:center; /* center horizontally */
        }
        .education-container{
        text-align:center;
        width:100%;
        }
        /* Title */
        .education-title{
        font-size:50px;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:40px;
        letter-spacing:2px;
        }
        /* Box */
        .education-box{
        width:60%;
        max-width:900px;
        margin:0 auto; /* center box */
        padding:40px;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        color:rgb(13, 225, 225);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .education-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-8px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        /* Each Item */
        .education-item{
        margin-bottom:30px;
        }
        .education-item h3{
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        font-size:22px;
        margin-bottom:8px;
        }
        .education-item p{
        font-size:18px;
        margin:0;
        }
        .education-item span{
        font-size:16px;
        opacity:0.8;
        }
        #education{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtagg#00ffe5;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Title */
        .education-title{
        font-size:50px;
        color:hashtag#00ffc3;
        margin-bottom:50px;
        letter-spacing:2px;
        }
        .education-container{
        text-align:center;
        width:100%;
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column; /* makes boxes vertical */
        align-items:center; /* center them */
        gap:30px; /* space between boxes */
        }
        /* Each Box */
        .education-box{
        width:300px;
        padding:30px;
        border:2px solid hashtag#000;
        border-radius:20px;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.866);
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.866);
        color: rgb(0, 255, 195);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .education-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        .education-box h3{
        color:hashtag#000;
        font-size:20px;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .education-box p{
        font-size:17px;
        margin:5px 0;
        }
        .education-box span{
        font-size:15px;
        opacity:0.8;
        }
        #experience{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f;
        text-align:center;
        }
        .experience-title{
        font-size:50px;
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:50px;
        text-align:center;
        }
        .experience-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        }
        .experience-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .experience-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        .experience-image img{
        width:220px;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        .experience-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:white;
        }
        .experience-details h3{
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .experience-details p{
        margin-bottom:15px;
        line-height:1.6;
        }
        .experience-year{
        font-size:15px;
        opacity:0.8;
        }
        #awards{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Container */
        .awards-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        }
        /* Award Box */
        .award-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .award-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        /* Image */
        .award-image img{
        width:220px;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        /* Right Content */
        .award-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:rgb(30, 194, 200);
        }
        .award-details h3{
        color:hashtag#d400ff;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .award-details p{
        margin-bottom:15px;
        line-height:1.6;
        }
        .award-year{
        font-size:15px;
        opacity:0.8;
        }
        #volunteer{
        padding:100px 20px;
        background:hashtag#0f0f0f;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Container */
        .volunteer-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        }
        /* Volunteer Box */
        .volunteer-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .volunteer-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        /* Image */
        .volunteer-image img{
        width:220px;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        /* Details */
        .volunteer-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:white;
        }
        .volunteer-details h3{
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        background-color:#0000ff;
        }
        .volunteer-details p{
        margin-bottom:15px;
        line-height:1.6;
        }
        .volunteer-year{
        font-size:15px;
        opacity:0.8;
        }
        /* CONTACT SECTION */
        .contact-container{
        display:flex;
        justify-content:center;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        flex-wrap:wrap;
        }
        .contact-box{
        width:260px;
        padding:35px;
        text-align:center;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.4);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .contact-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        .contact-box img{
        width:50px;
        margin-bottom:15px;
        }
        .contact-box h3{
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .contact-box p{
        font-size:15px;
        }
        .contact-box a{
        color:white;
        text-decoration:none;
        }
        .contact-box a:hover{
        color:hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        /* ===================== */
        /* PROJECT SECTION */
        /* ===================== */
        #projects{
        padding:100px 10%;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Container */
        .project-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        }
        /* Black Box */
        .project-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid hashtag#00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .project-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px hashtag#00ffe5;
        }
        /* Image */
        .project-image img{
        width:220px;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        /* Right Side Text */
        .project-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:white;
        }
        .project-details h3{
        color:hashtag#ff9500;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .project-details p{
        line-height:1.6;
        opacity:0.9;
        }
        /* ===== VIDEO SECTION ===== */
        .video-section{
        padding: 100px 0;
        text-align: center;
        }
        .section-title{
        font-size: 40px;
        margin-bottom: 60px;
        }
        .video-container{
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 50px;
        }
        .video-box{
        background-color: rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.795);
        width: 70%;
        max-width: 800px;
        padding: 30px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(118, 14, 59, 0.5);
        transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .video-box:hover{
        transform: translateY(-8px);
        }
        .video-box video{
        width: 100%;
        border-radius: 15px;
        }
        .video-content{
        margin-top: 20px;
        }
        .video-content h3{
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        /* ===================== */
        /* INDUSTRIAL VISIT */
        /* ===================== */
        #industrial-visit{
        padding:100px 10%;
        text-align:center;
        }
        .section-title{
        font-size:32px;
        margin-bottom:60px;
        color:#00ffe5;
        text-align:center;
        }
        /* Container */
        .visit-container{
        display:flex;
        flex-direction:column;
        align-items:center;
        gap:40px;
        }
        /* Black Box */
        .visit-box{
        width:75%;
        max-width:1000px;
        display:flex;
        align-items:center;
        gap:30px;
        padding:30px;
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid #00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .visit-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px #00ffe5;
        }
        /* Image */
        .visit-image img{
        width:220px;
        border-radius:10px;
        }
        /* Right Side Text */
        .visit-details{
        text-align:left;
        color:white;
        }
        .visit-details h3{
        color:#00ffe5;
        margin-bottom:10px;
        }
        .visit-details p{
        line-height:1.6;
        opacity:0.9;
        }
        /* ===================== */
        /* BADGES SECTION */
        /* ===================== */
        #badges{
        padding:100px 10%;
        text-align:center;
        }
        .badge-container{
        display:flex;
        justify-content:center;
        flex-wrap:wrap;
        gap:40px;
        }
        .badge-box{
        background:#000;
        border:2px solid #00ffe5;
        border-radius:20px;
        padding:25px;
        width:220px;
        box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,255,229,0.3);
        transition:0.3s ease;
        }
        .badge-box:hover{
        transform:translateY(-10px);
        box-shadow:0 0 40px #00ffe5;
        }
        .badge-box img{
        width:120px;
        margin-bottom:15px;
        }
        .badge-box h3{
        color:#00ffe5;
        font-size:18px;
        }
        footer{
        background-color: hashtag#0e0e1a;
        height : 233px;
        }
        .footer{
        display: flex;
        margin: 23px 122px;
        justify-content:space-evenly;
        }
        .footer ul{
        list-style: none;
        }
        .footer > div{
        width: 223px;
        }
        footer .footer-rights{
        text-align: center;
        color: gray;
        padding: 30px 0;
        }
        #skills{
        padding: 100px 10%;
        text-align: center;
        }
        .section-title{
        font-size: 40px;
        margin-bottom: 50px;
        }
        .skills-container{
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 30px;
        }
        .skill-box{
        background: #111; /* Black box */
        color: white;
        padding: 30px;
        width: 300px;
        border-radius: 12px;
        transition: 0.3s;
        }
        .skill-box:hover{
        transform: translateY(-10px);
        }
        .skill-box h3{
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        color: #00ffe5;
        }
        </style>
        </head>
        <body>
        <!-- NAVBAR -->
        <nav>
        <div class="logo">Zahra's Portfolio</div>
        <div class="hamburger" id="hamburger">☰</div>
        </nav>
        <!-- MOBILE MENU -->
        <div id="mobileMenu" class="mobile-menu">
        <div class="close-btn" id="closeBtn">✕</div>
        <ul>
        <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
        <li><a href="#about me ">About Me</a></li>
        <li><a href="#education section">Education Section</a></li>
        <li><a href="#certified-course/workshop">Certified-Course/Workshop</a></li>
        <li><a href="#badges">BADGES</a></li>
        <li><a href="#technicalinternship">Technical Internship</a></li>
        <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
        <li><a href="#awards">Awards/Achievements</a></li>
        <li><a href="#volunteerexperience">Volunteer Experience</a></li>
        <li><a href="#leadershipandacademicenagagementvideos">Leadership And Academic Enagegement Videos</a></li>
        <li><a href="#industrialvisit">INDUSTRIAL VISIT</a></li>
        <li><a href="#skills"> TECHNICAL SKILLS</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contactme">Contact Me</a></li>
        </ul>
        </div>
        <main>
        <section class="firstsection" id="home">
        <!-- LEFT SIDE TEXT -->
        <div class="leftsection">
        HI, MY NAME IS
        <span class="purple">ZAHRA ZARANWALA</span>
        <div> and I AM</div>
        <span id="element"></span>
        <div class="buttons">
        <button class="btn">Download Resume</button>
        <button onclick="openResume()" class="resume-btn">
        View Resume
        </button>
        </div>
        </div>
        <div class="rightsection">
        <img src="profile.jpg" alt="">
        </div>
        </section>
        <!-- LINKEDIN STATS -->
        <section class="home">
        <div class="stats-container">
        <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-number">2100+</div>
        <div class="stat-text">LINKEDIN FOLLOWERS</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-number">50+</div>
        <div class="stat-text">TECHNICAL POSTS</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
        <div class="stat-number">40+</div>
        <div class="stat-text">CERTIFICATIONS</div>
        </div>
        </div>
        </section>
        <hr>
        <section id="about me">
        <h2 class="about-title">ABOUT ME</h2>
        <div class="about-box">
        <p>
        Hi, I’m Zahra Zaranwala, an Electronics & Communication Engineering student with a deep interest in Artificial Intelligence, Embedded Systems, and Smart Technologies. I am driven by curiosity and a strong desire to understand how intelligent systems work and how they can be designed to solve real-world problems.
        Throughout my academic journey, I have developed a solid foundation in communication systems, signal processing, and core electronics. I actively enhance my skills through hands-on technical projects, internships, and certifications such as Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt and Generative AI. I enjoy combining theoretical knowledge with practical implementation to create meaningful technological solutions.
        Beyond academics, my participation in NCC — where I earned 2 Gold and 1 Silver medals — has shaped my leadership qualities, discipline, resilience, and teamwork skills. These experiences have strengthened my confidence and taught me the importance of consistency and responsibility.
        Still, I am strengthening my understanding of Machine Learning and Data Science fundamentals, focusing on core concepts such as data analysis, model building, and algorithmic thinking and Still I am continuously learning
        I am currently seeking internship opportunities in AI, Embedded Systems, and Automation, where I can apply my knowledge, gain industry exposure, and grow into a competent and impactful technology professional.
        </p>
        </div>
        </section>
        <hr>
        <section id="education section">
        <h2 class="education section-title">EDUCATION SECTION</h2>
        <div class="education-container"></div>
        <!-- Box 1 -->
        <div class="education-box">
        <h3>🎓 Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)</h3>
        <p>Government Engineering College, Dahod</p>
        <span>2023 – Present</span>
        <p>Currently in 6th Semester
        Interested in AI, Robotics & Communication Systems
        Key Subjects: Analog Communication, Digital Communication, MP/MC , ELECTRONICS etc</p>
        </div>
        <!-- Box 2 -->
        <div class="education-box">
        <h3>🏫 Higher Secondary (12th Grade)</h3>
        <p>ST STEPHEN’S HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL</p>
        <span>Year of Completion: 2022-2023</span>
        <p>Science Stream (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics)</p>
        </div>
        <!-- Box 3 -->
        <div class="education-box">
        <h3>🏫 Secondary School (10th Grade)</h3>
        <p>ST STEPHEN’S HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL</p>
        <span>Year of Completion: 2021-2022</span>
        <p>Developed academic discipline & technical curiosity</p>
        </div>
        </div>
        </section>
        </section>
        <hr>
        <section id="certified-course/workshop">
        <h2 class="certificate-title">CERTIFIED-COURSE/WORKSHOP</h2>
        <div class="certificate-container"></div>
        <!-- Certificate 1 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate1.jpg" alt="Certificate 1">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Google Student Ambassador</h3>
        <p>
        Proudly served as a Google Student Ambassador, representing Government Engineering College, Dahod.
        Led and actively contributed to tech initiatives, collaborated with a dynamic student community, and gained hands-on exposure to Google technologies. Strengthened leadership, communication, and teamwork skills while driving innovation on campus.
        Grateful for the mentorship and opportunity to grow as a future tech leader.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 22 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate22.jpg" alt="Certificate 22">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Matlab ssip</h3>
        <p>
        Certificate
        Matlab ssip
        I am excited to share that our campus has arranged 2 days workshop on 4th and 5th October.
        The workshop was on MATLAB.
        This workshop was arranged by our principal sir DR K.B judal sir and faculty members of our EC department.
        The workshop was fantastic,interesting with lots of knowledge.
        With that this session was also Hands-on-session with lots of fun.
        We learned practical used of MATLAB as well how it is useful in future.
        Also we learned topic like Machine learning and it's classification ,train-test split,overfitting vs.underfitting,Regression etc..
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 2 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate2.jpg" alt="Certificate 2">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🌟 Lean Six Sigma AI – Yellow Belt</h3>
        <p>
        Successfully earned the Certified Lean Six Sigma AI – Yellow Belt (CSSC accredited) in January 2026, clearing the final exam on my first attempt.
        Gained strong foundations in DMAIC methodology, process improvement, waste reduction, and AI-driven decision-making. Developed a structured, data-driven approach to problem-solving and quality enhancement.
        Committed to applying these principles in engineering and real-world innovation. 🚀
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 3 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate3.jpg" alt="Certificate 3">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>HTML FOR BEGINNERS</h3>
        <p>
        Completed the 'HTML - The Complete Guide to HTML for Beginners' course on Udemy. I am excited to expand my skills in web development and build amazing things
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 4-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate4.jpg" alt="Certificate 4">
        <img src="certificate4.1.jpg" alt="Certificate 4.1">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🔐 Cybersecurity Awareness – IIT Kanpur</h3>
        <p>
        Successfully completed the Cybersecurity Awareness Quiz 2025 and Advanced Cybersecurity Awareness Quiz 2025 organized by the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur under its Cybersecurity initiative.
        Enhanced my understanding of cyber threats, data protection, safe authentication, and responsible digital practices. As an Electronics & Communication Engineering student, this experience strengthens my commitment to secure and ethical technology development.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 5-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate5.jpg" alt="Certificate 5">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🤖 Data Science with AI</h3>
        <p>
        Attended the webinar “Data Science with AI: Tools, Trends & Real-World Use Cases” by TOPS Technologies.
        Gained insights into AI-powered data science workflows, industry tools, emerging trends, and real-world applications across domains. Strengthened my understanding of how intelligent systems drive data-driven decision-making.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 6 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate6.jpg" alt="Certificate 6">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🐍 Learn Python in 60 Minutes</h3>
        <p>
        Participated in the “Learn Python in 60 Minutes” webinar by TOPS Technologies.
        Developed a clear foundation in Python basics, syntax, and logic building — enhancing my programming skills as an Electronics & Communication Engineering student preparing for AI and tech-driven careers. 🚀
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 7-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate7.jpg" alt="Certificate 7">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>AWS Summit India Online</h3>
        <p>
        🌟 Thrilled to attend the AWS Summit India Online 2025!
        Attended AWS Summit India Online 2025 to explore the latest advancements in cloud computing, AI/ML, and AWS solutions. Gained insights from expert-led sessions and real-world industry use cases.
        A valuable experience learning about the future of cloud, AI, and AWS technologies.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 8 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate8.jpg" alt="Certificate 8">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🤖 Generative AI – LinkedIn Learning</h3>
        <p>
        Completed a Generative AI course via LinkedIn Learning, gaining foundational knowledge of AI models that create content such as text, images, and code.
        Learned about large language models (LLMs), prompt engineering, ethical AI use, and real-world applications of generative tools in productivity, automation, and innovation.
        This course strengthened my understanding of emerging AI technologies and their impact on modern engineering and digital transformation.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 9 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate9.jpg" alt="Certificate 9">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Introduction to Artificial Intelligence</h3>
        <p>
        📜 I’m proud to have completed the "Introduction to Artificial Intelligence" course offered by Infosys Springboard on June 24, 2025.
        Through this course, I gained a strong understanding of fundamental AI concepts such as machine learning, neural networks, natural language processing, and real-world AI applications. It also helped enhance my problem-solving and analytical thinking skills, laying a solid foundation for my future journey in AI and technology.
        Looking forward to applying this knowledge in building innovative AI-driven solutions! 🚀
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 10-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate10.jpg" alt="Certificate 10">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Machine learning fundamentals</h3>
        <p>
        Learning never stops! I’ve just completed the Machine Learning course from Infosys and gained valuable insights into Ai Predictive model.
        Name: Machine Learning
        Issuing Organization: Infosys
        Issue Date: 31st May 2025
        🎉 Just completed a Machine Learning course with Infosys!
        It was a great opportunity to deepen my understanding of ML algorithms, model evaluation techniques, and real-world applications.
        Grateful for the chance to upskill and explore the world of data and AI
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 11-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate11.jpg" alt="Certificate 11">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>💻 Full Stack Development – Demo Session Certificate</h3>
        <p>
        Earned a certificate after attending a Full Stack Development demo session by Edureka.
        Gained clarity on essential programming languages, project building strategies, internship pathways, and how to start a full stack career. The session also highlighted industry-based training and performance-driven certification opportunities. 🚀
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 12-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate12.jpg" alt="Certificate 12">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Principal Component Analysis</h3>
        <p>
        Today I came with certificate that I received after completion session on Principal component analysis.
        In this session I learned PCA without maths.
        What I learned about PCA?
        1-what is PCA
        3-How we can convert from 2 dimensions to 1 dimensions with the help of PCA.
        4-where PCA is used?
        So this are topic I learned about Principal component analysis.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 13-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate13.jpg" alt="Certificate 13">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>The Agnirva Space Internship Program</h3>
        <p>
        I am delighted to share that I received certificate an badges on completion of agnirva space program.
        This is cource they provided in which they give knowledge of space related information like about climate,cold War in space,different types of radiation proposals formation etc and many more things.
        I learned lot and lots of things from this program.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 14-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate14.jpg" alt="Certificate 14">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Data Science at Microsoft</h3>
        <p>
        Here again I came with certificate that I achieved after completion of live classes on scaler academy.
        The topic was what it takes to be a data scientist at Microsoft.
        It was live classes of 2.5 hour held on 4th February.
        The topic that covered in this are as follows:-
        1-Introduction of data scientist
        2-polls to known.
        3-which are skills required to take on Microsoft.
        4-what are rounder of interview in Microsoft for data scientist.
        5-What are projects made.
        It is really a wonderful knowledgeable session in which I learned lots of things with fun.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 15-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate15.jpg" alt="Certificate 15">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Data science vs Machine Learning vs Artificial Intelligence</h3>
        <p>
        Today I came with certificate that I achieved by attending session on topic of Data science VS machine learning VS Artificial Intelligence on 31st January.
        it is wonderful sessions of mine till now.
        I learned lot of things from this session.
        The main topic covered in this session are:-
        1-Defination of machine learning,Artificial Intelligence and data science.
        2-core components and methodologies of machine learning,data science and Artificial Intelligence.
        3-Application of data science,machine learning and Artificial Intelligence.
        4-Tools and technology used in machine learning,data science and Artificial Intelligence.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 16 -->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate16.jpg" alt="Certificate 16">
        <img src="certificate16.1.jpg" alt="Certificate 16.2">
        <img src="certificate16.2.jpg" alt="Certificate 16.2">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Workshop</h3>
        <p>
        I am excited to share that I successfully completed 3 online course in which 2 were the workshops and 1 sessions.
        This course provided by #let'supgrade team members.
        The 3 cources are as follows:-
        1-workshop on prompt engineering which held on 18 February 2024.
        The duration of this course was of 3 hours.
        2-Workshop on data visualization which held on 25 February 2024.
        The duration of this course was of 3 hours.
        3-Develop your own Google Assistance with AL which held on 19 January 2024.
        The duration of this course was of 1 hour.
        I learned lot of things from this course. Also I learned how to use this tools. And also how this tools help in future.
        I special thanks to #letsupgrade team members for providing this online course.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 17-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate17.jpg" alt="Certificate 17">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Convolution neutral network</h3>
        <p>
        I am excited to share that I have successfully completed one of the online courses that is provided by #greatlearning.
        This course is based on convolution neutral network. It is one of the topics of machine learning.
        This topic covered 2 things that are as follows:-
        1:- Image processing
        2:- Batch normalization
        In image processing, I learned how to convert analog image into digital image, digital noise, source of noise, Argumentation, Max Pulling...etc.
        And in Batch Normalization I learned how it works, how it is beneficial, what are the side effects... etc.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 18-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate18.jpg" alt="Certificate 18">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>Front-end Development:-Html</h3>
        <p>
        I am very excited to share that I started my coding journey and happy to share that I completed successfully "Front End development-HTML "course provided my great learning.
        And I got certification of completion.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 19-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate19.jpg" alt="Certificate 19">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>GEMINI WRITE-OFF</h3>
        <p>
        Excited to share that I successfully participated in the Gemini Write-off, organized by the Google Student Ambassador Program. Grateful for this opportunity to enhance my learning and innovation skills
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 20-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate20.jpg" alt="Certificate 20">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>🚀 Campus Hero Webinar</h3>
        <p>
        Successfully participated in the Campus Hero Webinar by Coding Ninjas.
        Gained valuable insights on building a strong coding culture, becoming a tech leader on campus, and connecting with a wider tech community. Inspired to continue growing in Electronics & Communication Engineering and technology.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Certificate 21-->
        <div class="certificate-box">
        <div class="certificate-image">
        <img src="certificate21.jpg" alt="Certificate 21">
        </div>
        <div class="certificate-details">
        <h3>WORKSHOP ON PROMPT ENGINEERING FOR 3 HOURS</h3>
        <p>
        I've successfully completed the Workshop on Prompt Engineering by LetsUpgrade in collaboration with ITM Edutech Training and GDG MAD! This intensive 3-hour workshop has equipped me with valuableskills in prompt engineering, which is crucial for leveraging the power of AI. Looking forward to applying these techniques to enhance mytechniques to enhance my projects and contribute to the AI community. #PromptEngineering #LetsUpgrade #AI #ITMEdutech #GDGMAD"
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        </div>
        </section>
        </div>
        </section>

        <section id="technicalinternship">
        <h2 class="section-title">TECHNICAL INTERNSHIP</h2>
        <div class="experience-container">
        <!-- Experience 1 -->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience1.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>IBM SKILLSBUILD AND CSRBOX MICRO INTERNSHIP</h3>
        <p>
        Successfully completed a Data Science Micro-Internship organized by IBM SkillsBuild in collaboration with CSRBOX Foundation
        • Gained hands-on exposure to Data Science fundamentals, including data analysis, data handling, and basic machinelearning concepts
        • Learned practical applications of AI and data-driven decision making in real-world scenariosWorked with industry-standard tools and methodologies to understand data workflows
        • Enhanced skills in analytical thinking, problem-solving, and technical communication
        • Earned an official internship certification recognized by IBM SkillsBuild and CSRBOX
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Experience 2 -->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience2.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>GenAI-Powered Data Analytics Intern (Virtual Simulations)</h3>
        <p>
        Completed a virtual internship focused on AI-powered data analytics. Gained hands-on experience in:
        Exploratory dataanalysis and data profiling
        Predictive modeling using AI
        Business report writing and strategic data storytelling
        Designing and implementing an AI-driven collections strategy
        Strengthened skills in using AI for business intelligence, improving decision-making with data, and communicating actionable insights.
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Experience 3 -->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience3.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>Cybersecurity job simulation</h3>
        <p>
        Completed a virtual job simulation focused on cybersecurity fundamentals. Gained practical experience in:
        Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals.
        IAM strategy assessment
        Designing custom IAM solutions.
        Platform integration.
        This experience enhanced my skills in assessing cybersecurity risks, implementing IAM protocols, and understandingreal-world cybersecurity workflows.
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Experience 4-->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience4.jpg" alt="Experience">
        <img src="experience4.1.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>Machine learning internship</h3>
        <p>
        Worked as a Machine Learning Intern, gaining hands-on exposure to data analysis, model building, and ML fundamentals.
        Performed data preprocessing, including data cleaning, handling missingvalues, and feature selection.
        Implemented basic Machine Learning models using Python for prediction and classification tasks.
        Analyzed datasets to identify patterns and insights for decision-making.
        Improved understandingof ML workflow.
        Demonstrated consistency, discipline, and strong learning attitude during the internship period.
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Experience 5 -->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience5.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>INTERNET OF THINGS INTERN</h3>
        <p>
        Completed a structured internship in Internet of Things (IoT)
        • Learned basics of sensors, microcontrollers, and IoT architecture
        • Improved understanding of real-world engineering systems
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Experience 6 -->
        <div class="experience-box">
        <!-- Left Image -->
        <div class="experience-image">
        <img src="experience6.jpg" alt="Experience">
        </div>
        <!-- Right Content -->
        <div class="experience-details">
        <h3>Data science and machine learning intern</h3>
        <p>
        Selected for a 6-week online internship focused on real-world applications of DataScience and Machine Learning.
        Collaborated with industry experts to strengthen problem-solving and analytical thinking.
        Developed a foundational understanding of ML workflows and deployment.
        </p>
        <span class="experience-year">REMOTE</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        </div>

        Proud to Share My First Project!
        I’m excited to present my first technical project:
        "Design and create my own protfolio" using html and css language.
        This project introduced me to practical experience of coding .

        2- design a portfolio using css language.

        <section id="volunteerexperience">
        <h2 class="section-title">Volunteer Experience</h2>
        <div class="volunteer-container">
        <!-- Volunteer 1 -->
        <div class="volunteer-box">
        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer1.jpg" alt="Volunteer 1">
        <img src="volunteer1.1.jpg" alt="Volunteer 1">
        <img src="volunteer1.2.jpg" alt="Volunteer 1">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>
        🌟 Honored to Receive a Letter of Appreciation | Grateful for This Learning Journey 🌟
        </h3>
        I’m truly grateful to share that I received a Letter of Appreciation for my contribution to the Google Student Ambassador Program.
        This experience has been incredibly meaningful for me. Through this initiative, I had the opportunity to support student outreach, help connect motivated learners with the program, and contribute toward building a strong and aligned applicant community. Being trusted with this responsibility helped me develop important skills such as communication, coordination, leadership, and community engagement.
        What made this journey special was not just the recognition, but the chance to positively impact fellow students by guiding them toward valuable learning opportunities. It taught me how small efforts, when done consistently and sincerely, can create real impact.
        I’m thankful to the program team for their guidance and encouragement, and for believing in my abilities. This recognition motivates me to keep improving myself, exploring new opportunities, and contributing wherever I can — especially in areas related to technology, learning, and student empowerment.
        As an Electronics & Communication Engineering student, experiences like these strengthen my confidence and push me closer to my professional goals. I look forward to continuing my growth journey, gaining more hands-on exposure, and making meaningful contributions in the future.
        </p>
        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Volunteer 2 -->
        <div class="volunteer-box">
        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer2.jpg" alt="Volunteer 2">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>Marketing Certificate</h3>
        <p>
        Completed a hands-on program focused on applying artificial intelligence in modern marketing. Developed practical skills in:
        content strategy, and digital ads using AI tools
        Platforms covered: Google Analytics, ChatGPT, Meta Ads, and others
        This certificate strengthened my ability to design data-informed marketing strategies using cutting-edge AI technologies.
        </p>
        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Volunteer 3 -->
        <div class="volunteer-box">
        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer3.jpg" alt="Volunteer 3">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>edulync LLP Student Partner (ISP)</h3>
        <p>
        Excited to share that I’ve been selected as an edulync LLP Student Partner (ISP)!
        As part of this role, I’ll be representing EDULYNC LLP at my college, promoting career-building opportunities, and helping fellow students find internships and upskill through online trainings.
        Looking forward to learning more about marketing, leadership, and communication throughout this journey!
        </p>
        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Volunteer 11-->
        <div class="volunteer-box">
        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer11.jpg" alt="Volunteer 11">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>Offer letter from tripple one solution</h3>
        <p>
        I am glad to announced that I received offer letter from tripple one solution.
        And I am excited to grab this opportunity
        and learn new skills.
        This is the type of opportunity I am looking for long time and I can't express now how I feel after I got this opportunity.
        Also anyone like to connect with me to grab same opportunities connect with me.
        Also they provide 3 types of courses.
        1-self paced program
        2-Mental led program
        3-professional program
        </p>
        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Volunteer 4-->
        <div class="volunteer-box">
        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer4.jpg" alt="Volunteer 4">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>offer letter for the position of Full Stack Java Development Intern at Zidio Development</h3>
        <p>🌟 Thrilled to share a new milestone in my journey!
        This opportunity marks the beginning of my transition from learning to applying — and I’m excited to deepen my understanding of:
        🔹 Java & Spring Boot
        🔹 MySQL & REST APIs
        🔹 Frontend technologies
        🔹 Real-world software development practices
        I’m truly grateful for this opportunity and ready to give it my best. Here's to growing, coding, and creating impactful solutions! 🚀

        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Volunteer 5 -->

        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer5.jpg" alt="Volunteer 5">
        </div>
        <div class="volunteer-details">
        <h3>🎉 Excited to Begin My Journey as an Internshala Student Partner (ISP)!</h3>
        📅 07/06/2025
        I’m thrilled to share that I’ve been selected as an Internshala Student Partner (ISP)!
        Internshala is one of India’s leading platforms for internships and training programs, and I feel honored to be part of a mission that empowers students through opportunities and skill-building.
        As an ISP, I look forward to: ✨ Promoting valuable internships and online trainings
        ✨ Enhancing student engagement and professional awareness
        ✨ Connecting my peers with 80,000+ brands through Internshala
        Looking forward to making the most of this learning experience and creating real impact!<
        </p>
        <span class="volunteer-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        </div>

        <div class="volunteer-image">
        <img src="volunteer6.jpg" alt="Volunteer 6">
        </div>

        This badge recognizes my proficiency in Python programming, covering key concepts like data types, functions, loops, conditionals, and working with libraries like Pandas and NumPy.
        This is an important step in my journey toward becoming an AI Product Engineer, and I’m looking forward to applying these skills in real-world data and AI projects.

This certification strengthened my analytical thinking and enhanced my understanding of how finance supports strategic and technical growth.

        <section id="leadershipandacademicenagagementvideos" class="video-section">
        <h2 class="section-title">LEARDERSHIP AND ACADEMIC ENGAGEMENT VIDEOS</h2>
        <div class="video-container">
        <div class="video-box">
        <video controls>
        <source src="videos/work1.mp4" type="video/mp4">
        </video>
        <div class="video-content">
        <h3>Learning Journey</h3>
        <p>2025 has been a year of growth, learning, and consistency.
        This short video is a reflection of what I’ve worked on, learned, and achieved so far —
        from academics and skill development to personal discipline and goal alignment.
        Grateful for the journey, lessons, and people who supported me.
        Looking forward to building more in the coming year. 🚀</p>

        <section id="industrialvisit">
        <h2 class="section-title">INDUSTRIAL VISIT</h2>
        <div class="visit-container">
        <!-- Visit 1 -->
        <div class="visit-box">
        <div class="visit-image">
        <img src="einfochips.jpg" alt="einfochips Visit">
        <img src="einfochips1.1.jpg" alt="einfochips Visit">
        </div>
        <div class="visit-details">
        <h3>eInfochips Ahmedabad Visit</h3>
        <p><strong>Date:</strong> 24 September 2025</p>
        <p>
        Visited eInfochips Ahmedabad for industry exposure and real-world learning experience.
        The visit helped bridge classroom knowledge with practical applications.
        </p>
        <p>
        Key Learnings:
        Continuous learning, skill enhancement, importance of communication skills,
        exposure to real industry environment.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Visit 2 -->
        <div class="visit-box">
        <div class="visit-image">
        <img src="startup.jpg" alt="Startup Conclave">
        <img src="startup1.2.jpg" alt="Startup Conclave">
        </div>
        <div class="visit-details">
        <h3>Startup Conclave 2023</h3>
        <p><strong>Date:</strong> 8 December 2023</p>
        <p>
        Learned about Startup India initiative launched by PM Narendra Modi.
        Explored innovation ecosystem, smart farming, EV technology,
        irrigation systems and entrepreneurship opportunities.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Visit 3 -->
        <div class="visit-box">
        <div class="visit-image">
        <img src="smartcity.jpg" alt="Smart City Dahod">
        <img src="smartcity1.1.jpg" alt="Smart City Dahod">
        </div>
        <div class="visit-details">
        <h3>Smart City Dahod Visit</h3>
        <p>
        Learned about traffic management systems, smart poles, surveillance cameras,
        waste management systems and centralized control room operations.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Visit 4-->
        <div class="visit-box">
        <div class="visit-image">
        <img src="airforce.jpg" alt="indian air force">
        <img src="airforce1.1.jpg" alt="indian air force">
        </div>
        <div class="visit-details">
        <h3>INDIAN AIR FORCE EXHIBITION</h3>
        <p>
        We were honored to host the Indian Air Force's Induction Publicity Exhibition Vehicle Drive today at Government Engineering College, Dahod. This event was organized for students from various engineering branches, and we are thrilled to share that more than 250 students participated with great enthusiasm!
        A heartfelt thank you to Wing Commander G G Maxmillan, Flight Lieutenant Karan Gurung, Flying Officer Aparna Kanwar, and the incredible Team Disha from AIR HQ New Delhi for their dedication and efforts in igniting curiosity and passion among young minds. Their insights into the vast career opportunities in the Indian Air Force were truly inspiring and eye-opening for all attendees.
        Such initiatives not only guide students towards a bright career but also instill a sense of pride and motivation to contribute to our nation.
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        </div>
        </section>

        <section id="contactme" class="section">
        <h1 class="section-title">CONTACT ME</h1>
        <div class="contact-container">
        <!-- Email Box -->
        <div class="contact-box">
        <img src="icons/email.jpg" alt="Email Logo">
        <h3>Email</h3>
        <p>zaranwalazahra@gmail.com</p>
        EMAIL ME ONLY FOR PROFESSIONAL CONTACT LIKE FOR PROJECT,JOB.INTERNSHIP ETC
        </div>
        <!-- LinkedIn Box -->
        <div class="contact-box">
        <img src="icons/linkedin.png" alt="LinkedIn Logo">
        <h3>LinkedIn</h3>
        <p>
        <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/gecdhd-ec-zahra"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer">
        View Profile
        </a>
        </p>
        </div>
        <!-- GitHub Box -->
        <div class="contact-box">
        <img src="icons/github.jpg" alt="GitHub Logo">
        <h3>GitHub</h3>
        <p>
        <a href="https://github.com/zahratech123"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener noreferrer">
        View Projects
        </a>
        </p>
        </div>
        </div>
        </section>
        </main>
        <script src="https://unpkg.com/typed.js@3.0.0/dist/typed.umd.js"></script>
        <script>
        var typed = new Typed('#element', {
        strings: [' ELECTRONICS AND COMMUNICATION ENGINEER STUDENT', 'TECH EXPLORER','FUTURE ENGINEER','GOOGLE STUDENT AMBASSADOR','NCC C CERTIFICATE HOLDER','GEN AI CERTIFIED','ELECTRONICS ENTHUSIAST','CONTINUOUS LEARNER','ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE ENTHUSIASTIC'],
        typeSpeed: 50,
        });
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(){
        const hamburger = document.getElementById("hamburger");
        const menu = document.getElementById("mobileMenu");
        const closeBtn = document.getElementById("closeBtn");
        hamburger.addEventListener("click", function(){
        menu.classList.add("active");
        console.log("Menu Opened"); // for testing
        });
        closeBtn.addEventListener("click", function(){
        menu.classList.remove("active");
        console.log("Menu Closed"); // for testing
        });
        });
        function openResume(){
        window.open("Zahra_Zaranwala_Resume.pdf", "_blank");
        }
        </script>
        </body>
        </html>
